Feel the thrill at your fingertips!
Unleash devastating finishing blows with your team in dynamic turn-based battles.
Collectible, turn-based RPG—Star Sailors!

"This is no longer the world we once knew."
A world divided by the Magic Explosion.
To rebuild the Human Kingdom,
the legendary Heirlooms must be found.
Begin your own voyage in the direction pointed by the legendary compass!

■ Meet Unique Partners in a Fairytale Fantasy World Brought to Life by Artist Coax
A fairytale-inspired fantasy world realized through high-quality cartoon rendering that preserves the charm of handcrafted artwork.
Collect characters with unique appearances, personalities, and stories, and experience the fun of a collection RPG as you create your own story.
Immerse yourself in anime-style visuals, dazzling skill animations, and spectacular recruit sequences inspired by subculture and anime aesthetics.
Talk with your Partners and discover their stories through special interactions.

■ Plan Your Strategy, Unite Your Team, and End Battles with a Single Explosion!
Turn the tide of battle with skill synergies between Partners and elemental advantages.
Break enemy defenses with Break effects and seize victory through Burst Chance QTEs that unleash all your accumulated buffs at once!
The familiar charm of classic JRPGs is enhanced with deeper strategy through the combination of Classes, Monsters, and Anomalies.

■ Easy to Play, Satisfying to Grow
Reduce repetitive grinding with the Sweep system and immediately deploy newly recruited Partners through the Link system.
Start casually like an idle game and discover progression depth comparable to a JRPG.

* Official Website: https://starsailors.com2us.com?r=p13

* Naver Lounge: https://game.naver.com/lounge/Star_Sailors/home

* X: https://x.com/StarSailors_EN


This game supports 한국어, English, 日本語, 简体中文, 繁體中文, ภาษาไทย, Tiếng Việt, and Bahasa Indonesia.

Society has fallen. Survival is all that remains.

Rick Grimes woke from a coma to find the world transformed. Cities abandoned. Families torn apart. The living forced to become something new just to survive. Step into the world of AMC’s The Walking Dead universe and begin your journey where it all started, in an action game shaped by the characters and stories fans know and love.

Now it’s your turn.

Begin your journey on the outskirts of Atlanta, where a fragile camp struggles to endure against the constant threat of the walkers. What starts as a desperate fight for survival quickly becomes something more. A test of leadership and who you are willing to become.

You are not alone.

Fight as iconic survivors from across the universe of AMC’s The Walking Dead, including Rick Grimes, Daryl Dixon, Michonne, Glenn, and Maggie. Each survivor brings unique weapons, abilities, and combat styles into every run. Whether you prefer precision, power, or survival instincts, your choice of fighter will shape every encounter.

Every Survivor has their strengths.

🏕️ Build your camp and assign garrison survivors to strengthen defenses, generate resources, and support your long-term survival
⚔️ Take control of combat survivors with distinct abilities and playstyles in every run

Every decision matters. Every run is different.

🔥 Fight through relentless swarms and herds of walkers, including armored, burning, and other deadly walker variants
⚠️ Face dangerous human enemies, desperate to survive by any means necessary
📈 Grow stronger every run with new abilities, upgrades, and evolving strategies
🏕️ Build and defend your camp, turning a fragile shelter into a place worth fighting for
⚔️ Choose your approach, whether aggressive, tactical, or survival-focused
🌍 Explore locations inspired by the world of AMC’s The Walking Dead

Survival is not just about fighting the dead. It is about protecting the living.

Fans of survival games, roguelite progression, and action RPG gameplay will find a fast-paced experience built around skill, growth, and replayability.

The world has ended. The fight has just begun.

How long can you survive?

This is just the beginning.
